prompt: Our NIGO rate for new accounts submitted to Schwab is running at 28%. Most rejections are missing signatures, incorrect entity titling, and incomplete beneficiary designations. I need to redesign our account opening workflow to get this under 10%. What should the new process look like?

assertions.text: Addresses NIGO root cause analysis and specific rejection patterns
Proposes workflow validation gates or pre-submission checks
Discusses operational process improvement (not just compliance requirements)
Mentions specific custodian integration or submission mechanics
Outlines 5+ steps or phases in the redesigned workflow
Identifies 4+ distinct edge cases or pitfalls in account opening
